key_insights: Maternity leave applicants default at 40% — 5x the average rate
Borrowers aged 20-30 show 11.4% default rate — highest of all age groups
Lower education level strongly correlates with higher default risk
External credit scores (EXT_SOURCE_2/3) are the strongest risk predictors
Applicants renting homes default at 12.3% vs 7.8% for house owners
